Bash(cd "C:\\_\\Repos\\Sandbox\\Plan Reviewer" && cat > /tmp/quality_check.sh << 'EOF'
#!/bin/bash

echo "=== CODE QUALITY ANALYSIS ==="
echo ""

files=\(
  "src/webview/components/CommentForm.tsx"
  "src/webview/components/CommentCard.tsx"
  "src/webview/components/CommentNavigator.tsx"
  "src/webview/App.tsx"
  "src/webview/components/PlanViewer.tsx"
  "src/shared/PromptGenerator.ts"
\)

for file in "${files[@]}"; do
  echo "File: $file"
  
  # Check for unused imports
  unused=$\(grep "^import" "$file" | wc -l\)
  used=0
  while IFS= read -r import_line; do
    name=$\(echo "$import_line" | sed 's/.*import[^}]*{\\\([^}]*\\\)}.*/\\1/' | sed 's/ //g' | sed 's/as.*//' | head -c 50\)
    if [ ! -z "$name" ] && grep -q "$name" "$file" | head -1; then
      \(\(used++\)\)
    fi
  done < <\(grep "^import" "$file"\)
  
  # Check for dead code patterns
  console_logs=$\(grep -c "console\\." "$file" 2>/dev/null || true\)
  comments=$\(grep -c "^[[:space:]]*//.*TODO\\|FIXME\\|XXX\\|HACK" "$file" 2>/dev/null || true\)
  
  if [ $console_logs -gt 0 ]; then
    echo "  ⚠ Warning: Contains $console_logs console.* calls \(may be debug\)"
  fi
  
  if [ $comments -gt 0 ]; then
    echo "  ⚠ Warning: Contains $comments TODO/FIXME comments"
  fi
  
  echo "  ✓ Imports: $\(grep '^import' "$file" | wc -l\) lines"
  echo "  ✓ Size: $\(wc -l < "$file"\) lines"
  echo ""
done

EOF
chmod +x /tmp/quality_check.sh
bash /tmp/quality_check.sh)
